description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions test workflow named Test that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: lint, docs, mypy, tests, fuzzing, and memory, each running on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8 setup. The lint job checks code style with Black, flake8, and isort. The docs and mypy jobs install Tox and run specific test environments. The tests job uses a matrix strategy to test with different Python versions and optimization flags. The fuzzing job runs tests in parallel with a large matrix of groups. The memory job runs Tox with a memory test environment. Each job uploads coverage to Codecov.
